common.name: Name
common.labelFieldHint: Optional: shorter text on the public website. If empty, the service name is shown.
common.labelHtmlFieldHint: HTML per language (subtitle under the name). Leave empty if not needed.
common.translationTabsHint: Each tab is an active site language. Fill at least one name to save; optional description, short display label, and HTML label for services.
common.translationTabsNoLanguages: No active languages. Activate languages in the list first.

dictionary.deleteConfirm: Remove the Firestore override for this key?
dictionary.invalidKey: Invalid key: lowercase letter then a-z, digits, . _ - (max 128 characters).
dictionary.hint: Keys without a Firestore document use built-in defaults. Saving creates or updates the document.
dictionary.siteLocalesHint: Active languages (table columns and editor locale) come from “Languages”. Built-in defaults are still FR / EN only; other columns are filled via Firestore overrides.
dictionary.subtitle: Admin UI copy per active language. Overrides are stored in Firestore (translations field).
dictionary.title: UI dictionary

languages.create.title: Languages — Create
languages.list.label: Label

login.subtitle: Sign in with a Firebase account (email / password).
login.title: Yaayatoo Admin
onDemandServices.list.title: On Demand Services — List
onDemandServices.list.subtitle: On demand services per country and locale. Linked to existing services.

cms.title: CMS — Content management
cms.subtitle: Manage website subsections. Fields are editable per language ({locale}).
cms.subtitleSections: Create namespaces (Home, Contact…) then sections and assign them. Content is editable per country and language ({locale}).
cms.noNamespacesHint: Create a namespace under “Namespaces” first to organize sections.
cms.features.sectionsHint: Add feature blocks. Paste inline SVG for the icon (white fill recommended).
cms.features.errorNeedTitle: Enter a title for this tab.
cms.faq.sectionsHint: Each column has a subtitle and a list of questions. Answers support rich text (per language / country tab).
cms.faq.question: Question
cms.faq.errorNeedTitle: Enter the main FAQ title for this tab.
cms.stat.rowHint: Each line: stat title and value (e.g. +675 or 1200).
cms.stat.errorNeedTitle: Enter a title for this tab.
cms.banner.avatarLinksHint: One URL per row (facepile). Shown in order.
cms.banner.errorNeedTitle: Enter a banner title for this tab.
cms.section.createError: Namespace, key and title are required.
cms.section.selectHint: Pick a section in the left column or create one.
cms.section.noSectionsInNamespace: No sections in this namespace yet.
cms.settings.title: CMS — Settings
cms.settings.subtitle: Global links and contacts used by the website.
cms.blogNews.articles.title: Blog & News — Blog articles
cms.blogNews.articles.subtitle: Blog article management entry point.
cms.newsFeed.title: Blog & News — News Feed
cms.newsFeed.subtitle: Ticker items used in the website footer marquee.
cms.newsFeed.errorLoad: Could not load news feed items.
cms.newsFeed.errorNeedTitle: Fill at least one title before saving.
cms.why.itemsHint: One line per bullet in the lists.
cms.why.itemsHintDynamic: Add or remove a field for each bullet. Saved data is still one line per item for the API.
cms.why.thumbnailHint: Paste a URL or upload a file to Firebase Storage (JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF, max {maxMb} MB). The URL field is filled automatically after upload.
cms.why.errorNeedHeading: Main heading is required for each saved language.
cms.namespace.listSubtitle: Logical spaces (Home, Contact, About…) to group sections.
cms.namespace.empty: No namespaces yet. Create one to group sections.
cms.namespace.deleteConfirm: Delete this namespace? Sections may stay unassigned.

cms.namespace.createErrorNeedName: Enter a label in at least one language.
cms.namespace.invalidKey: Invalid key: start with a letter, then letters, digits or hyphens (max 64).
cms.errorNeedTranslation: Fill at least one translation before saving.

users.firebase.create.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number for the selected country.
users.firebase.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this Firebase account? Linked Firestore profiles are not removed automatically.

users.firebase.sendOtpHint: Requires FIREBASE_WEB_API_KEY on Cloud Functions and ideally NEXT_PUBLIC_RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY (v3) here.
